
## Business Intelligence & AI<br>Summer 2026<br><br>![](RiceBusiness-transparent-logo-sm.png){width=40%}


### Instructor

[Kerry Back](https://kerryback.com)<br> (<a href="mailto:kerryback@gmail.com">kerryback@gmail.com)</a><br>
J. Howard Creekmore Professor of Finance and Professor of Economics

### Course Description

This course explores how AI agents are transforming business intelligence — from querying databases in plain English to building automated reporting pipelines, deploying document AI, and developing enterprise AI strategy.
